chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.No.D-691 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 16.10.2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Leghari, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner, while filing the statement for withdrawal, submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been addressed. Accordingly, under instructions, he does not wish to press the present Constitution Petition. In view of the above, the present petition is disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
